description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a tall green hedge, featuring a front yard with a driveway and an orange car parked beside a concrete walkway. The house has a light-colored exterior with multiple large rectangular windows and a gable roof with a mix of shingle and green flat sections. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch with columns, a small balcony above, and a blossoming tree in the yard. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool and landscaped garden areas with flowers and shrubs. The property is enclosed by a concrete wall at the front and dense hedges on the sides and back, providing privacy. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with clean lines and a welcoming, residential feel.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gable roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a front yard featuring a driveway, car, and blossoming tree. The property is enclosed by hedges and includes a backyard pool and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, balcony, driveway, orange car, blossoming tree, and front garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, car, side windows, and partial view of the backyard pool and garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows, arched door, and dense hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard pool, blossoming tree, and the side of the house with multiple windows and hedge boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, balcony above, concrete steps, and a prominent front door
